$schema_description: Unified pricing rate card for the STOREX GROUP covering two business units: Sezona a Pece (gardening & landscaping, brand sezonapece.cz) and DomovFix (flat/house renovation, finishing & home maintenance, domovfix.cz). Each service carries a 'business_unit' tag. Built as a reference dataset for an AI pricing skill: a quote = sum of line items x modifiers + fees, with a minimum floor and a final VAT step. Use only the modifiers/fees relevant to the service's business unit.

domovfix.name: DomovFix
domovfix.domain: Turnkey flat/house renovation, finishing & home maintenance
domovfix.model: Fixed price + fixed deadline + 24-month warranty, agreed after free site survey

meta.data_vintage: Mostly 2025-2026 published price lists and aggregators; a few older itemised tables kept for structure (flagged in source notes). | recalibrated 2026-06-15 vs real quote (Tuřany earthworks)

vat_rates.note: Since 2024 CZ VAT = 21% standard + 12% reduced. Construction/assembly work on residential housing ('stavby pro bydleni') generally qualifies for 12%; standalone handyman/appliance/non-residential and most gardening services are 21%. Many consumer price lists quote 'vcetne DPH' (incl) while trade ceniks quote 'bez DPH' (excl). Decide per job + per customer.

meta.price_basis_default: GARDENING rates are usually labour (some incl. material where noted); RENOVATION trade rates are usually LABOUR ONLY (bez materialu) unless 'scope' says otherwise. Keep labour and material in separate buckets.
important_caveats: Published prices are floor/standard; 'low' = budget/large-area/contract floor, 'typical' = realistic Prague rate, 'high' = small/awkward/premium/old-building conditions.
Prague runs higher than other CZ regions; treat the upper half of national ranges as the Prague baseline.
These are MARKET reference points, not your margins. Anchor the final card to your own cost base, overhead and warranty.
Filter by business_unit first, then apply only that unit's relevant modifiers and fees.

units_glossary.m2: square metre (area work) | square metre (area work: plaster, paint, tiling, flooring, drywall)
units_glossary.bm: běžný metr / running metre (linear: hedges, edging) | běžný metr / running metre (linear: skirting, beam cladding, channel cutting, lintels)
units_glossary.ks: kus / piece (trees, stumps, plants, jobs per item) | kus / piece (doors, fixtures, sockets, windows, per-item tasks)
units_glossary.m3: cubic metre (mulch, soil, bulk waste) | cubic metre (demolished masonry, bulk waste)
units_glossary.hod: hour (ad-hoc labour, machine time) | hour (handyman/trade labour, material handling)
units_glossary.km: kilometre (transport, usually round-trip) | kilometre (transport, usually flat Prague call-out instead)
units_glossary.cm_prumer: per cm of STUMP/TRUNK DIAMETER at ground level (stump grinding)
units_glossary.job: flat per-job price | flat per-job / per-task price
units_glossary.flat_month: per residential flat per month (SVJ/HOA contracts)
units_glossary.flat: per whole flat (rewire, cleaning, by flat size e.g. 1+1, 2+1)

pricing_modifiers.name: VAT reduced 12% (renovation/assembly work on residential housing)
pricing_modifiers.applies: final step on net subtotal for qualifying residential construction work

pricing_modifiers.name: Occupied flat (work around residents/furniture, protection, daily clean)
Old/pre-war building (uneven walls, brick dust, surprises)
No elevator / high floor (material & waste carry)
Small rooms / curved / complex surfaces / many cuts
Whole-flat / large scope discount
pricing_modifiers.applies: per-unit rates drop on big coordinated jobs

pricing_modifiers.name: Poor machine access (narrow gate, dense urban, no vehicle reach)
Small plot surcharge (<200-300 m2)
pricing_modifiers.effect: use hourly rate or min job charge instead of per-m2; per-m2 rate effectively higher

pricing_modifiers.name: Large-area / volume discount
pricing_modifiers.applies: per-unit rate drops with quantity (many trees/stumps/plants, big lawns)

min_job_charge.note: Floor for small jobs; felling/stump often 1000-1500 minimum.

transport_van.note: Round-trip from depot. Some bill from a fixed origin point.

transport_machine.note: Ride-on mowers / heavy machines; often free within ~10 km.

handyman_min_visit.note: Effective floor = ~1 hour + call-out. Many bill in 15-30 min intervals after the first hour.

renovation_min_job.note: Floor for a small trade job mobilising a crew.

callout_transport_prague.note: Flat Prague call-out fee; outside Prague add per km.

transport_per_km_outside.note: Round-trip from depot. ~25 Kc/km typical (real: 40 km job billed ~2000).

material_handling.note: 'Přesun materiálu' if not pre-staged on the floor of works.

waste_container_bathroom_5m2.note: Removal + container for a small bathroom strip-out (excl. landfill fees).

soil_container_5m3.note: Soil removal: container delivery + haul + tipping fee (~5 m3 each). Compute count from excavation volume, NOT from the inquiry.

mobilization_machine_outside_prague.note: Transport of machine + material + container positioning for an out-of-Prague job (~+30 km). Replaces per-km transport on machine earthwork jobs. Calibrated to real median 7000 (range 6000-8000).

services.note: Fallback rate for work without a per-unit price.

services.name_en: Brushcutter work (hourly, where area not measurable)

services.note: Covers ~2000-2200 m2/h in tall grass. Min billed 2-3 h. Transport separate.
Often free if it converts to a job.
Includes turf material + laying.
Example bundle: 2x scarify, 2x rake, 1x mow, 1x fertilize, waste removal.

services.name_en: Annual contract, lawn from 300 m2 (6x mow, 2x fertilize, 1x scarify, haul)
services.note: Minimum-area package benchmark.

services.name_en: Annual contract, lawn from 500 m2 (8x mow, 2x fertilize, 2x scarify, haul)
Annual contract, lawn from 750 m2 (12x mow, 3x fertilize, 2x scarify, 2x comb, overseed, haul)

services.note: m2 of cut surface.
Working at height adds cost.

services.name_en: Maintained hedge per running metre, to 150 cm
Maintained hedge per running metre, over 150 cm
Deciduous tree planting incl. hole, <=3 m

Labour only; plant extra.
6-8 cm layer; some quote + fabric.

services.note: Open space, low risk. Min ~1000 Kč.

services.name_en: Sectional risk felling, conifer, per m height

services.name_cs: Rizikové postupné kácení listnáče za m

services.name_en: Risk felling, no rope-catching of wood (each)
services.name_cs: Rizikové kácení bez chytání do lana
Rizikové kácení s chytáním do lana
services.note: Overall job benchmark: avg ~12600, typical 7700-21400.

services.name_en: Stump grinding, per cm of diameter
services.note: Measured at ground level. Depth 10 cm lawn / 20 cm beds. Example Ø50 cm => 500-1500 Kč. Min call-out ~1000 + transport.
By height & crown size; climbing work may be hourly.
Custom, after site visit.
Lower with simple pop-up zones, higher with drip + components.
>1.5 m may need permit + structural engineer.

services.name_en: Natural stone step (1 bm, set in grit)

services.note: Mulched beds + lawn + basic planting.
Edging, better planting, stepping stones, gravel seating.

services.name_en: Swimming pond w/ filtration, stream or waterfall
services.note: Per m2 of water surface.
+ material + transport. RTK antenna >2 m mounting extra. Sometimes free with purchase.
Or per 1/4-h machine time. Usually a seasonal contract.

services.name_en: SVJ/HOA cleaning per flat per month

services.note: Common Prague rate 590-800/h. Tools included. Some firms use fixed per-task prices instead (see installation/plumbing/electrical).
Urgent fixture work 600-1500/h.

services.name_en: Painter labour (malíř) - where m2 not used

services.name_cs: Bourání zděné příčky z plné cihly

services.name_en: Demolish masonry partition (per m2, by thickness 60-300 mm)
Remove steel door frame (incl. cutting wall)

services.note: Scales with volume; ~3600 for a 5 m2 bathroom strip.

services.name_en: Build Ytong/aerated block wall (per m2, by thickness 50-375 mm)
services.note: 320 (50mm) to 550 (375mm), excl. adhesive.

services.name_cs: Zdění ze skleněných luxfer vč. spárování

services.note: + filling channels back, similar rate.

Hand lime core plaster (by thickness 20-40 mm)

services.note: Ceilings cost more (overhead work).
Cross-grid +~30/m2.

Q2 ~20, Q3 ~60, full bandaging ~100.
Estimate; varies with layers/finish.

services.name_en: Lay tiles incl. grouting, standard format
services.note: Baseline 'obklady a dlažba od 600'; small format ~420-600.
Bathroom example ~1800 flat for small area.

services.name_en: Paint coat (per coat, wall or ceiling)
services.note: Usually 2 coats; colour/vinyl paint slightly higher. Often quoted incl. paint at 40-70/m2 for 2 coats + prep.
Estimate; pattern-match & murals higher.

services.name_en: Small bathroom (~5 m2) full reno - LABOUR ONLY
services.note: Incl. strip-out, masonry, electrics, plumbing, waterproofing, tiling labour, sanity install, finishing. Tiles + sanity material EXTRA.

services.note: Wide range driven by tile/sanity grade and size; this is the client-facing turnkey figure.

services.note: Door + frame material extra.

services.note: From bathroom reno breakdown.
1-3 fixtures ~1250 total; 4+ ~500/each.

services.name_en: Full flat rewire (labour, by flat size)
services.note: 1+1 ~14000, 2+1 ~18000, 3+1 ~21000 labour; material + revision extra (see note).
1-2 h per unit; large/complex more.
Estimate, scales with run length/appliances; ~1500-3000/bm rule of thumb.
Excl. scaffolding & material.
Estimate; per element pricing also common.
Full design incl. layout + 3D + material schedule.
Fixed per room up to ~20 m2 (30 m2 for living+kitchen).
Highly variable; depends on device count & integration. Treat as bespoke project, not a line rate.

services.note: Layout changes, all new wiring/plumbing, high-grade finishes.

services.note: All-in supply + install of plastic lawn edging. Calibrated to real quote (80 bm = 20 000).
Supply + lay weed-control geotextile. ~50 m2 per roll.

services.name_cs: Kačírek / drcený kámen – dodání + ruční rozvoz a rozprostření
services.note: ALL-IN: material + delivery + manual barrow + spread. Use instead of gravel_material_only when we supply AND place it.
Shallow strip digging (edging beds, trenches). Volume = length*width*depth. Container disposal billed separately.

services.name_cs: Práce minibagrem vč. obsluhy (výkop, srovnání, modelace do spádů)
services.note: Per working day incl. operator; ~up to 40-50 m3/day. Use for terrain leveling / bulk excavation.

quote_algorithm.description: Unified logic for both business units. Always: (1) filter services by business_unit, (2) build line items, (3) apply modifiers, (4) add fees, (5) enforce minimum, (6) apply VAT.
steps: 1. Identify the business_unit (sezonapece vs domovfix) and quote MODE: itemised build-up, OR a per-m2 / per-unit benchmark (whole-garden realization, whole-flat turnkey). Don't mix a turnkey per-m2 with itemised lines for the same scope/area.
2. For each line: pick base rate (low for large/simple/contract scope, typical default, high for small/awkward/old-building/premium).
4. Apply only the modifiers in that line's 'modifiers' list that the situation triggers, multiplicatively (use mid of value_range unless severity known). Surcharges (>1) and discounts (<1) stack.
5. labour_net = sum of labour-scope lines; material_net = sum of materials (apply material_supply_markup if the firm supplies them).
6. Add fees relevant to the unit: transport/call-out once; material_handling if not pre-staged; waste/container/tipping where applicable.

EARTHWORKS RULE: whenever dimensions are given, COMPUTE the volume yourself (area * excavation_depth, or length*width*depth for strips) and derive the container count = round(volume_m3 / 5). NEVER trust a container/volume count stated in the inquiry. Price machine excavation/leveling with excavation_minibagr_day (min 1 day), shallow strips with excavation_strip_light per m3, and EACH soil container with soil_container_5m3. Add mobilization_machine_outside_prague once for out-of-Prague machine jobs. Flag that the deepest excavation may need +1 container.
7. net_total = max(labour_net + material_net + fees, applicable minimum [handyman_min_visit / renovation_min_job / min_job_charge]).

8. VAT: 12% for qualifying RESIDENTIAL construction/assembly (DomovFix housing reno); 21% for gardening, standalone handyman, appliance and non-residential. Lines marked vat 'incl_21_typical' / 'incl' are NOT taxed again. State the assumed rate.

9. Present a fixed price (DomovFix) or itemised quote (Sezona a Pece) with scope + key assumptions (size/condition, material grade, access, season, VAT). Optionally show a low-high band by re-running with low/high base rates.

gardening.scenario: 300 m2 lawn, fortnightly mow with collection, flat easy-access Prague garden, VAT-registered, 8 km from depot.
gardening.calc: mow_rotary_collect typical 4.3 * 300 = 1290; regular_contract_discount ~0.9 => 1161; transport 15*8*2=240; net 1401 -> below min => max(1401, min_job_charge 1500)=1500; +VAT 21% => ~1815 Kc gross per visit.

renovation.scenario: Repaint a 2+1 (~150 m2 wall+ceiling), occupied flat, Prague, firm supplies paint.
renovation.calc: prep ~25*150=3750; 2 coats ~2*20*150=6000; masking ~10*150=1500; labour_net ~11250; occupied_flat *1.15 => ~12940; paint material ~3000*1.2=3600; callout 400; net ~16940; VAT 12% (residential) => ~18970 Kc; round to ~19000 Kc fixed.

domovfix_renovation: rekonstrukcelp.cz (itemised renovation ceník, Dec 2025 - backbone for demolition/masonry/plaster/drywall/flooring/painting/bathroom)
pm-reko.cz / richtigbau.com / virtualnibydleni.cz (whole-flat per m2 & benchmarks, 2025-2026)
ŠikovnýMuž.cz / Jan Meloun (vas-remeslnik.cz) / CleanWhale / Daibau opravář / stehovanicz.cz (handyman fixed prices & hourly, 2025-2026)
Hornbach tiling ceník (2025) / 3dnavrhy.cz / s-stavdevelop.com / qjob.cz (tiling per m2)

calibration_log.note: Real quoting style is lump-sum per line (qty 1 ks); rate-card unit rates derive those lumps.
